reception.description: After the ceremony there will be coffee and cake, followed by dinner and dancing.

dressCode.complementary: A dark suit means a matching suit jacket and trousers in the same fabric and style. The color should be black, dark gray, or dark blue. The shirt should be light, and a tie or bow tie should be worn. You may also choose to wear a dress; the color is optional, but it should give a dressed-up impression, preferably in a fine material. The dress should fall below the knees and may go all the way down to the ankles. A slit is allowed.

ceremony.title: Ceremony
ceremony.desc: Bus transportation will be arranged from the hotel to the church, more info under the Transportation tab.

kids.message: Children are wonderful, but on this day we choose to celebrate in adult company.

transportation.title: Transportation
transportation.intro: Bus transportation will be arranged between the hotel, church, and reception venue.
transportation.note: Please be on time at the bus stop. The bus leaves at the listed times.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.intro: We recommend staying at Starby Hotel, where we have arranged transportation for the wedding day.
accommodation.promoCodeNote: The promo code "Bröllop2026" is already included in the booking link.

gift.title: Gifts
gift.intro: We are so happy that you want to celebrate our big day with us.
gift.details: Your presence is the greatest gift, but if you would like to give us something, a contribution to our honeymoon would mean a lot.
gift.listStatus: The gift list is under construction.

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.intro: Please let us know if you can make it by June 30th, 2026.

dayBefore.title: The day before - September 18
dayBefore.description: We are planning a self-paid dinner at Hotel Starby inspired by our first date, so we can reserve a table for those who want and can join.
dayBefore.question: Would you like to join?

rsvp.name: Full Name
rsvp.toastmasterNoteBefore: If you want to give a speech or plan something fun during the celebration, you can find the toastmasters under
rsvp.successMsg: Your RSVP has been sent successfully.
rsvp.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address (must include {'@'}).
rsvp.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have questions, please call one of us.
